LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF WILIAM HAROLD MORRIS, III. GRANTED IN PART. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO PAY $2,000 A MONTH TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY SUBMIT ANOTHER CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AFTER A YEAR. ANY FUNDS HELD BY THE SHERIFF MAY BE GIVEN TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gary Kaplan, Esq. 415-954-4400 of Farella Braun & Martell LLP for Plaintiff.
Mark Bostick, Esq. 510-834-6600 of Wendel Rosen for Defendant William Harold Morris III.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The court asks about the $40,000 monthly expense and multi million assets. Defendant argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF WILIAM HAROLD MORRIS, III.

Granted in part. Judgment Debtor is to pay $2,000 a month to the Judgment Creditor. The Judgment Creditor may submit another claim of exemption after a year. Any funds held by the Sheriff may be given to the Judgment Creditor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Continued To Jan-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gary Kaplan, Esq. 415-954-4940 of Farella Braun & Martel for Plaintiff.
Mark Bostick, Esq. 510-834-6600 of Wendel Rosen for Defendant william Harold Morris.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. After meeting and conferring in the hallway, Plaintiff reports the matter has not settled. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MEGAN MORRIS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued to 1/17/19 for parties to continue talking settlement. If a further continuance is needed, parties can request a continuance by email.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-13-2018 Continued To Jan-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gary M. Kaplan, Esq., Farella Braun & Martel, Telephone 415-954-4400, appearing for Plaintiff;
Mark S. Bostick, Wendel Rosen, Telephone 510-834-6600, appearing for Defendant William Morris;

The Court makes the following ruling:

Defendant William Harold Morris III's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to January 3, 2019. Amended Opposition is to be filed by December 20, 2018.

Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/HEK)
